seo.description: We2 is the couple's app for emotional growth. Build daily rituals, save memories in time capsules, and grow your virtual pet together. Trusted by 10,000+ couples worldwide.
seo.keywords: couple app, relationship tracker, love journal, anniversary reminder, couple goals, emotional intimacy, long distance relationship

hero.title: Grow Together, Love Deeper
hero.subtitle: The couple's app that turns everyday moments into lasting emotional habits. Daily check-ins, time capsules, and a virtual pet that grows with your love.

features.title: Built for Real Couples
features.subtitle: Every feature designed to bring you closer, no matter the distance.

sharedJournal.title: Daily Check-in
sharedJournal.desc: 5-minute daily questions designed by relationship psychologists. Build emotional intimacy, one day at a time.

moodTracker.title: Time Capsules
moodTracker.desc: Lock photos, voice memos, and letters to open on future anniversaries. Your private memory vault.

dreamWall.title: Virtual Pet
dreamWall.desc: Raise a pet together by completing daily challenges. Watch it grow as your relationship strengthens.

dailyGratitude.title: Private Community
dailyGratitude.desc: Share stories anonymously with couples worldwide. Get advice, celebrate milestones, feel less alone.

petAdoption.title: Shared Journal
petAdoption.desc: Write together, reflect together. A private space for your shared story.

timeCapsule.title: Dream Wall
timeCapsule.desc: Pin your dreams, goals, and wishes — build your future together.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose what fits your journey. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about We2

items.question: What is We2 and how does it help couples?
items.answer: We2 is a relationship growth app that helps partners build emotional habits through daily check-ins, time capsules, and shared challenges. It's designed by psychologists to strengthen emotional intimacy over time.

items.question: Is my data private and secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption for all personal content. Your intimate moments, photos, and messages stay between you and your partner. We never sell your data to third parties.

items.question: Can we use We2 in a long-distance relationship?
items.answer: Yes! We2 is specifically designed for all couples, whether you're in the same room or across the world. Time capsules and daily check-ins are perfect for maintaining connection across distance.

items.question: How does the virtual pet work?
items.answer: Your pet grows as you and your partner complete daily check-ins and challenges together. It's a fun, visual representation of your relationship growth. Different pets and skins unlock as you reach milestones.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept PayPal for global users, Alipay for mainland China users, and AlipayHK for Hong Kong/Taiwan users. All transactions are secure and encrypted.

items.question: Can I cancel my membership?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel anytime. Your membership remains active until the end of your current period. We also offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for new subscribers.

items.question: How do I connect with my partner?
items.answer: After signing up, send your partner a unique invite code. Once they accept, your accounts are linked and you can start sharing check-ins, capsules, and growing your pet together.

items.question: Is there a community feature?
items.answer: Yes! Our anonymous community lets you share stories, ask advice, and celebrate milestones with couples worldwide. You can choose to post anonymously or with your couple profile.

dailyCheckIn.longDesc: Start each day with a thoughtful question designed to deepen your emotional connection. Answer privately, then reveal and discuss with your partner. Our questions are crafted by relationship psychologists to build intimacy over time.
dailyCheckIn.step1: Receive a daily question each morning
dailyCheckIn.step2: Answer privately before seeing your partner's response
dailyCheckIn.step4: Discuss and earn love points for your virtual pet

timeCapsules.longDesc: Create digital time capsules filled with photos, voice memos, and love letters. Lock them away and set a future unlock date — perfect for anniversaries, milestones, or just a surprise on a random Tuesday.
timeCapsules.step1: Create a capsule with photos, notes, or voice memos
timeCapsules.step2: Set a future unlock date (anniversary, birthday, etc.)
timeCapsules.step3: Both partners can add content until the capsule is sealed
timeCapsules.step4: Receive a notification when it's time to unlock together

virtualPet.longDesc: Meet your shared virtual pet — a cute companion that grows as your relationship grows. Complete daily check-ins and challenges to earn love points, unlock new skins, and watch your pet evolve.
virtualPet.step1: Choose and name your pet together
virtualPet.step2: Earn love points by completing daily check-ins
virtualPet.step3: Feed, play, and care for your pet as a team
virtualPet.step4: Unlock new skins and evolutions at relationship milestones

privateCommunity.longDesc: Join an anonymous, supportive community of couples from around the world. Share your stories, ask for advice, and celebrate milestones — all in a safe, private space.
privateCommunity.step3: Engage with posts from other couples
privateCommunity.step4: Build connections in a supportive, moderated space

sharedJournal.longDesc: Write your story together — literally. A shared journal where both partners can add entries, reflect on memories, and build a timeline of your relationship's most precious moments.
sharedJournal.step1: Create a new journal entry anytime
sharedJournal.step2: Both partners can view, edit, and comment
sharedJournal.step3: Add photos and location tags to entries
sharedJournal.step4: Scroll through your relationship timeline together

dreamWall.longDesc: Pin your shared dreams, goals, and bucket list items on a visual board. Plan your future together — from your next vacation to your dream home — and check them off as you achieve them.
dreamWall.step1: Add dreams and goals to your shared board
dreamWall.step2: Organize by category (travel, home, adventures, etc.)
dreamWall.step3: Set target dates and track progress together
dreamWall.step4: Celebrate each achievement with a special animation
